name: Creamed Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over and wash the spinach thoroughly.
2. Add salt and cook until tender. Do not add water.
3. Chop the spinach very fine.
4. Melt the butter in a saucepan, add the flour and blend.
5. Slowly add the milk and stir constantly until the mixture thickens.
6. Combine with the chopped spinach, then add the pepper and nutmeg.
7. Serve.
